## Wave Description

This wave aligns Tier 1 agent contracts with the Tier 2 lifecycle, evidence, scope, and live-validation gates that were previously hardened. The three affected contracts are:

- `foreman-v2-agent.md` → v2.15.0: adds 20-gate `required_checks`, `live_gate_check`, `halt_if_missing_or_stale`, `per_pr_scope_model`, `ui_app_evidence`, `ci_policy`
- `independent-assurance-agent.md` → v2.10.0: adds ACR-01–16 triggers, `halt_if_missing_or_stale`, `per_pr_scope_model`
- `execution-ceremony-admin-agent.md` → v1.6.0: adds `halt_if_missing_or_stale`, `per_pr_scope_model`, `ui_app_evidence`, `ci_policy`

**Builder involved**: CodexAdvisor-agent (T-WAT-001 — AC1–AC6 delivered under AGENT_FILE_GUARD NO-AGENT-FILES-001)
